plugin.name: Welcome Overview
plugin.description: Overview of the desktop shell, platform services, and plugin architecture.
title: What Micro Toolkit already solves
body: Micro Toolkit now owns both the plugin shell and the app platform layer: it discovers plugin metadata at startup, imports modules on demand, caches pages after first use, and provides shared services for workflows, settings, themes, shortcuts, startup behavior, and language switching.
card.discovery.title: Lazy discovery
card.discovery.body: The sidebar is generated from AST metadata, so heavy libraries stay unloaded.
card.pages.title: Lazy pages
card.pages.body: Each tool widget is created only when you open it for the first time.
card.services.title: Shared services
card.services.body: Plugins receive config, logging, session history, workflows, commands, and background workers.
card.platform.title: Platform features
card.platform.body: Themes, RTL-aware language switching, tray behavior, startup integration, and shortcuts now live in the app core.
foot: Next step: keep refining the desktop UX and add more headless command support to plugins that need deeper workflow and CLI automation.
